Package org.openapitools.codegen.config

Class WorkflowSettings.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings.Builder
Enclosing class:
WorkflowSettings
public static final class WorkflowSettings.Builder extends Object
WorkflowSettings builder static inner class.

  • Method Summary

    Description
    WorkflowSettings
    build()
    Returns a WorkflowSettings built from the parameters previously set.
    WorkflowSettings.Builder
    withEnableMinimalUpdate(Boolean enableMinimalUpdate)
    Sets the enableMinimalUpdate and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.

    • withGenerateAliasAsModel

      public WorkflowSettings.Builder withGenerateAliasAsModel(Boolean generateAliasAsModel)
      Sets the generateAliasAsModel and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together. An 'alias' is a primitive type defined as a schema, and this option will attempt to construct a model for that primitive.
      Parameters:
      generateAliasAsModel - the generateAliasAsModel to set
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder
